mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_ID AS pageId, TITLE AS title, SUMMARY AS summary, HELP_VERSION AS helpVersion, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn FROM UI_HELP_PAGE WHERE PAGE_ID = #{value}

SELECT ITEM_ID AS itemId, PAGE_ID AS pageId, TITLE AS title, BODY AS body, ANCHOR_SELECTOR AS anchorSelector, DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder, ACTIVE_YN AS activeYn, PLACEMENT AS placement, IMAGE_URL AS imageUrl, ICON_NAME AS iconName, HIGHLIGHT_STYLE AS highlightStyle, CTA_LABEL AS ctaLabel, CTA_URL AS ctaUrl FROM UI_HELP_ITEM WHERE PAGE_ID = #{value} ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, ITEM_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_HELP_PAGE ( PAGE_ID, TITLE, SUMMARY, HELP_VERSION, ACTIVE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{pageId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{helpVersion}, #{activeYn}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
mapper.update: UPDATE UI_HELP_PAGE SET TITLE = #{title}, SUMMARY = #{summary}, HELP_VERSION = #{helpVersion}, ACTIVE_YN = #{activeYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_DATETIME WHERE PAGE_ID = #{pageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UI_HELP_ITEM ( ITEM_ID, PAGE_ID, TITLE, BODY, ANCHOR_SELECTOR, DISPLAY_ORDER, ACTIVE_YN, PLACEMENT, IMAGE_URL, ICON_NAME, HIGHLIGHT_STYLE, CTA_LABEL, CTA_URL, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{itemId}, #{pageId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{anchorSelector}, #{displayOrder}, #{activeYn}, #{placement}, #{imageUrl}, #{iconName}, #{highlightStyle}, #{ctaLabel}, #{ctaUrl}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
